title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Program Brief: Oop Alternate Constructors
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop alternate constructors increment in validated library entity types. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
